artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2024-04-23
artifacts.excerpt:
for me, the big win with LLMs for coding isn't the autocomplete, which is annoying and has saved me ~0 time

rather it's when you know something is probably possible, and you want to quickly figure out how to do it with some tool that you don't know very well
